title: lucinaea forbesii
intro: Lucinaea forbesii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a type of coffee or tea shrub, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever, due to its ability to stimulate digestion and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Lucinaea forbesii include its potential to improve digestion, boost energy, and support immune function, making it a popular choice among herbalists. Herbal preparations of Lucinaea forbesii include tea infusions, infusions with other herbs, and dried leaf extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
